page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores utilizing the x86_64 architecture, driven by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per core. No local storage or dedicated GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth operations fall within the average range. Specifically, uncached memory read bandwidth is measured at 39.07 GB/sec, while write bandwidth reaches 28.29 GB/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 vector extensions, Vector Neural Network Instructions (VNNI), and Bfloat16, which assist in accelerating cryptographic and vector-based calculations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density make this instance a stable choice for workloads requiring predictable performance without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio is well-suited for general-purpose applications, including medium-scale web serving, database operations, redis caching, and multi-threaded decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.4xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance powered by a dedicated 16-core AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.0 GB per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance, alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The processor supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and VNNI. Given its balanced resource allocation and dedicated CPU execution, the ecs.g8a.4xlarge is suited for workloads such as web serving, database operations, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 7 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core performance for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and 64 GB RAM for predictable general-purpose compute workloads.
